expectations.evidence: memory.js created with loadHistory, clearHistory, getAppId, formatTurnTime — exactly matching skill template
webai.js has ...rest spread, forwarding appId and other options through to host.request()
App.jsx imports getAppId and passes appId to every streamCompletion call
useEffect on mount calls loadHistory(appId).then(mem => setTurns(mem.recentTurns))
'Clear history' button wired to clearHistory(appId) with state reset
